74146.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest - June 6
74146.body:
AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: CryptoBeholder.com


Автор: CryptoBeholder.com

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-6-cryptobeholder-fuyaf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BQG0V9sSrQU%2BYByypwaP2yg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3WQ6L2C8QJTYg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mq2l3jnn~gj-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq2l3jnn-gj
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Crypto is deep in its worst week since July 2024: Bitcoin broke $60,000 for the first time since October 2024, AI exposed a catastrophic 4-year Zcash forgery bug, and U.S. lawmakers simultaneously pushed crypto tax relief and stalled the Clarity Act on ethics grounds. 📉 Bitcoin Breaks Below $60,000 — Weakest Price Since October 2024 Bitcoin fell below $60,000 on Friday as several headwinds converged: Strategy's surprise BTC sale, 13 consecutive sessions of ETF outflows, a blowout jobs report raising Fed rate-hike fears, and sustained capital rotation into AI stocks. The drop marks a 52% decline from its October 2025 all-time high and the lowest price since October 2024. Read full story 🤖 AI Exposes 4-Year Zcash Forgery Bug — ZEC Crashes 50%, $5B Wiped A security researcher using Anthropic's Opus 4.8 uncovered a critical flaw in Zcash's Orchard privacy pool that had gone undetected since May 2022, allowing unlimited counterfeit ZEC to be minted invisibly. Zcash lost $5 billion in market value, the token fell 50%, and an emergency hard fork was deployed in five days. Security experts now warn similar hidden bugs may exist in other crypto protocols and traditional banking software. View more 🏛️ BlackRock-Backed Securitize Clears SEC Hurdle to Go Public on NYSE Securitize, the tokenization firm behind BlackRock's BUIDL fund, moved a major step closer to a public listing after the SEC approved its merger registration statement with Cantor-backed SPAC Cantor Equity Partners II. Shareholders will vote on June 29, with the NYSE listing expected to close shortly after — a landmark moment for the tokenization sector amid turbulent markets. Read more ⚖️ Senator Alsobrooks: Clarity Act Needs Ethics Deal Before Senate Vote Maryland Democratic Senator Angela Alsobrooks stated that bipartisan crypto legislation is close but cannot advance without resolving remaining ethics and illicit finance provisions. Her comments underline the razor-thin window remaining before the Senate breaks for summer, with Galaxy estimating the Clarity Act's odds of passing in 2026 at 50-50 or lower. See details 🔍 AI Auditor Who Cracked Zcash Turns His Sights on Monero Taylor Hornby, the security engineer who used Claude Opus 4.8 to expose Zcash's Orchard flaw, confirmed he will next audit Monero and other privacy coins using

73968.subject: RE: Переклад.
73968.body:
Добрий день!
Можемо забезпечити переклади, але попередньо рекомендуємо проконсультуватись з церквою,  де буде проводитись обряд вінчання які документи необхідні для проведення цієї процедури.  

Адреса офісу:

 <https://www.google.com/maps/search/Torysk%C3%A1+3+040+11+Ko%C5%A1ice?entry=gmail&source=g> Toryská 3

 <https://www.google.com/maps/search/Torysk%C3%A1+3+040+11+Ko%C5%A1ice?entry=gmail&source=g> 040 11 Košice

2-й поверх, 110  кабінет

Робочі години – 8:00 – 16:00, пн-пт.

З повагою,

UA preklady s.r.o.

+421918635854





 

 

From: Oleg Novosadov <novosadovoleg@gmail.com> 
Sent: Tuesday, June 2, 2026 8:36 PM
To: info@ua-preklady.sk
Subject: Переклад.

 

Доброго дня, 

 

Цікавить переклад документів для вінчання у Словаччині.

 

Дякую. 

 

Гарного дня.

73274.subject: Svadobná výzdoba
73274.body:
Zdravíme nevestu💍🤍,

Ďakujeme veľmi pekne za vašu správu.. Termín svadby máme ešte voľný a veľmi
radi budeme súčasťou vašej svadby.🤍

Spravidla sa s klientami stretávame osobne v showroome v Rozhanovciach
(kúsok od Košíc) kde si spolu vieme vyskladať svadobnú výzdobu a na základe
toho vytvoriť cenovú ponuku na mieru pre vás ak by ste mali záujem prosím
navrhnite deň a čas kedy by vám to najviac vyhovovalo aby sa časovo radi
prispôsobíme vášmu času. Poprípade, ak sme mimo Košíc či Prešova, radi si s
Vami dohodneme videohovor. Prosím navrhnite deň a čas, ktorý by Vám
vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez víkend aj vo večerných hodinách. 🙂
Najbližsie voľne termíny máme ešte aj tento týždeň. Forme stretnutia sa
radi prispôsobíme Vám, čo je pre Vás praktickejšie ☺️

Budeme sa tešiť na prípadnú spoluprácu s Vami.

S pozdravom

Lenka Gattiker,
Vaša osobná posh asistentka
